claim: You can build working web applications in minutes without prior coding knowledge by describing your app idea in words and letting AI generate the implementation.
actionable: Describe your app idea in natural language to Claude, then refine the output iteratively by providing feedback on what you want to change.
source_title: Build your first app with AI. No coding background required

claim: Iterating with AI to improve app outputs is a core best practice when building with AI—you should go back and forth with the AI to tweak results until they work exactly how you want.
actionable: When your AI-generated app doesn't work perfectly, provide clear feedback on what to change and let the AI refine the implementation incrementally.
source_title: Build your first app with AI. No coding background required
